name: Manus AI
description: General AI agent by Butterfly Effect (Wuhan) capable of autonomous web browsing, coding and research tasks. Acquired by Meta 2025.

seo.title: Manus AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Manus AI: General AI agent by Butterfly Effect (Wuhan) capable of autonomous web browsing, coding and research tasks. Acquired by Meta 2025.

when_to_use: Delegating multi-step research tasks to an autonomous agent
Running complex web research, coding, and writing in one session
Orchestrating workflows where AI completes subtasks independently
Building agent-powered automations that handle full task sequences

pros: Genuine autonomous agent for complex tasks
Strong demo quality on web research and coding
cons: Historically gated access and long waitlists
review.verdict: Watch closely post-Meta; today it's more research bet than stable production agent.
review.best_for: Early adopters experimenting with autonomous agents for research workflows
review.not_for: Production use cases needing stable SLAs and clear roadmap

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
